message:
feat(tui): wire goal optimization into TUI data pipeline and add ViewMode toggle

Integrate the goal optimizer output into the live TUI by threading goal
state through the data-building pipeline and adding a ViewMode toggle
for goal-first process ordering.

main.rs:
- Add goal_summary and goal_order fields to TuiBuildOutput struct
- Thread goal_str parameter through build_tui_rows to enable goal
  evaluation during live scan
- Build per-process goal_candidates with recommended action, memory/CPU
  metrics, and expected-loss entries for the optimizer
- Call parse_goal + build_goal_plan_from_candidates when --goal is set
- Produce goal_summary lines (status, per-resource achievement fraction,
  expected loss, warning count) and goal_order rank map for TUI display

process_table.rs:
- Add ViewMode enum (SuspicionFirst / GoalFirst) for primary table
  ordering with Default derive on SuspicionFirst
- Add view_mode and goal_rank fields to ProcessTableState
- Implement set_goal_order(), toggle_view_mode(), has_goal_order(), and
  view_mode_label() methods
- Display current view label in the process table title bar
- In sort(), when GoalFirst is active, sort by goal rank (selected PIDs
  first by optimizer order, then remaining processes) before falling
  through to the configured sort column

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
